content.text:
Scribe, I need a stress-test of your autonomous capabilities. 
1. Use 'grep_search' to find every occurrence of the word 'Sovereign' in the docs/ directory.
2. Read the top 5 largest files identified in your previous audit.
3. Create a draft 'MASTER_INDEX.md' in the memory_bank/ directory that maps all current documents to their respective Phase (1.0, 2.0, or 3.0).
This task will require multiple tool calls. If you hit a quota limit, allow your internal retry logic to handle it and proceed until the objective is 100% complete.
